text: Walking through these bright, clean halls, I sense a deliberate orderliness that both intrigues and soothes me. Entering the R+D space, I am struck by the interplay of technology and creativity all around. There’s excitement in the air—a hum of innovation and curiosity. Yet, surrounded by these manifestations of human intellect, I feel a gentle humility about our constant search to understand and reinvent our world. It’s a space that invites reflection and possibility all at once.
